title: GeoPulse 1.34.0
highlights: Added personal access tokens for the backend REST API, including token management in user profiles and admin visibility
Added Geoapify and ChibiGeo reverse geocoding providers with updated admin geocoding settings and Helm/environment configuration
Added Motorcycle as a trip type with configurable motor vehicle classification preferences, digest metrics, insights, and timeline support
Improved Timeline trip quality by fixing trip classification logic and filtering poor-accuracy GPS points from rendered paths
Added average trip speed to Timeline trip details, map popups, and reports
Added place search when creating favorites, so points can be added from search results instead of only map clicks
Improved GPS technical data with seconds in timestamps, a Delta column, and a backend endpoint for the latest GPS point timestamp
Added default measurement unit configuration for new users, Proxmox LXC installation documentation, and proper Raspberry Pi 4 release builds

title: GeoPulse 1.33.0
highlights: Added new trip type 'Boat'. GeoPulse now can identify if you traveled over land or water. Disabled by default, can be enabled in Timeline settings
Made Timeline collapsable on desktop and other small UI fixes
